{{Infobox character
| name = Kashi
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Kashi]] is a [[Truegold]] commander of the [[Akura troops]] and a conscript from [[Akura]] lands.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10">''Bloodline'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Kashi]] wields a pair of swords that crackle with silver madra.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Kashi]] is a [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
